name: Cloverleaf Pizza
teaser: 70+ years old. If you grew up eating it, you might prefer it to Buddy's. Classically good.
review: Another chain that's 70+ years old. I rank this under Buddy's, but if I grew up eating it maybe I would prefer it because it's just classically good. And like Buddy's, the new spots are carry-out only, so make sure you check before trying to crush a fresh pie.
headsUp: Call ahead — newer locations are carry-out only.
update: A classic that holds its own.
